name: Violin Memory, Inc.
description: Violin Memory, Inc. was an American technology company based in Silicon Valley, California, that specialized in the design and manufacture of high-performance computer data storage products. The company focused on providing scalable flash-based memory infrastructure for large dataset applications, aiming to lower the total cost of memory for enterprise customers. By utilizing proprietary hardware and software, Violin Memory sought to deliver significant improvements in storage performance, power efficiency, and space utilization. Although it was once a publicly traded company on the NYSE, it eventually underwent restructuring and ceased operations as an independent entity.
